modification.description: Add 'Exclude from similar threads' checkbox to thread edit
modification.replace: $1 <xf:if is="$thread.canEditModeratorFields()"> <xf:option name="qq_exclude_from_similar" value="1" selected="{$thread.qq_exclude_from_similar}" label="{{ phrase('qq_exclude_from_similar_threads') }}" hint="{{ phrase('qq_exclude_from_similar_threads_hint') }}" /> </xf:if> $2
